title: How a TikTok video saved a former golf prodigy from Pretoria streets
description: NATIONAL NEWS - More than a year ago, a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - More than a year ago, a viral TikTok video of a Pretoria man begging at a Lynnwood traffic light touched thousands of hearts.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - More than a year ago, a viral TikTok video of a Pretoria man begging at a Lynnwood traffic light touched thousands of hearts."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Pretoria Rekord, that man was Jaco Niemand (40), a former South African golf champion who had been trapped in addiction and living on the streets for nearly 15 years.","html":"According to Pretoria Rekord, that man was Jaco Niemand (40), a former South African golf champion who had been trapped in addiction and living on the streets for nearly 15 years."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The video sparked an outpouring of support, setting Niemand on a path of recovery that has brought him further than he ever thought possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His love for golf began when he was just four years old. By the age of nine, he had become the South African champion over 3km in his age group — a promising young sportsman with dreams of making it big.","html":"His love for golf began when he was just four years old. By the age of nine, he had become the South African champion over 3km in his age group — a promising young sportsman with dreams of making it big."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"After school, he pursued his studies in golf, confident of a bright future in the sport.","html":"After school, he pursued his studies in golf, confident of a bright future in the sport."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The vicious cycle of addiction"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"During his university years, Niemand’s life took a darker turn. Introduced to drugs, he soon found himself partying hard, making a lot of money, and numbing his emotions with cocaine. Over time, he moved on to Cat, heroin, and finally, nyaope.","html":"During his university years, Niemand’s life took a darker turn. Introduced to drugs, he soon found himself partying hard, making a lot of money, and numbing his emotions with cocaine. Over time, he moved on to Cat, heroin, and finally, nyaope."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I started using to suppress pain I didn’t want to deal with,” he says. “As men, we’re never really taught how to handle our emotions.”","html":"“I started using to suppress pain I didn’t want to deal with,” he says. “As men, we’re never really taught how to handle our emotions.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The more he used, the more his life unraveled. Eventually, he lost everything — his possessions, his career prospects, and his home. His addiction demanded up to R2 500 a day, with each fix costing around R250.","html":"The more he used, the more his life unraveled. Eventually, he lost everything — his possessions, his career prospects, and his home. His addiction demanded up to R2 500 a day, with each fix costing around R250."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It’s a vicious cycle — the more your conscience bothers you, the more you use to silence it,” he explains.","html":"“It’s a vicious cycle — the more your conscience bothers you, the more you use to silence it,” he explains."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A newspaper clipping of his cross country success.","html":"A newspaper clipping of his cross country success. "},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A second chance"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"By the time photographer Albert Bredenhann met him in Lynnwood, Niemand was gaunt, desperate, and dangerously close to death. That day, Bredenhann gave him R100 — money Niemand admits he used to buy drugs.","html":"By the time photographer Albert Bredenhann met him in Lynnwood, Niemand was gaunt, desperate, and dangerously close to death. That day, Bredenhann gave him R100 — money Niemand admits he used to buy drugs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"But the real turning point came the next day, when Bredenhann returned, took him for coffee, and drove him directly to a rehabilitation centre, stopping to buy him clothes along the way because Niemand had nothing.","html":"But the real turning point came the next day, when Bredenhann returned, took him for coffee, and drove him directly to a rehabilitation centre, stopping to buy him clothes along the way because Niemand had nothing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“When I saw Jaco and heard his story, I knew he didn’t belong on the streets,” Bredenhann says. “I wanted people to see that those on the streets are human beings with dreams and hope.”","html":"“When I saw Jaco and heard his story, I knew he didn’t belong on the streets,” Bredenhann says. “I wanted people to see that those on the streets are human beings with dreams and hope.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At the rehab centre, Niemand broke down under a hot shower — his first in months. “On the streets, lice take over your body. That shower felt like washing off my old life,” he says.","html":"At the rehab centre, Niemand broke down under a hot shower — his first in months. “On the streets, lice take over your body. That shower felt like washing off my old life,” he says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This wasn’t his first attempt at sobriety. Niemand had tried seven times before, relapsing six times. “In the beginning, I stayed clean for Albert — I didn’t want to disappoint him. But after six weeks, I realised I had to do it for myself.”","html":"This wasn’t his first attempt at sobriety. Niemand had tried seven times before, relapsing six times. “In the beginning, I stayed clean for Albert — I didn’t want to disappoint him. But after six weeks, I realised I had to do it for myself.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of his hardest moments in recovery was apologising to his twin brother, who had driven every month to beg him to go to rehab. “I wasn’t ready before. Timing is everything.”","html":"One of his hardest moments in recovery was apologising to his twin brother, who had driven every month to beg him to go to rehab. “I wasn’t ready before. Timing is everything.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Albert Bredenhann and Jaco Niemand. Photo: Facebook","html":"Albert Bredenhann and Jaco Niemand. Photo: Facebook "},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Rediscovering his passion"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Now 20kg heavier, Niemand is healthier, happier, and rediscovering his passions. Most days, he can be found on the golf course — the place he says feels most like home.","html":"Now 20kg heavier, Niemand is healthier, happier, and rediscovering his passions. Most days, he can be found on the golf course — the place he says feels most like home."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Golf has been my passion since I was four. It’s part of who I am, and I still dream of a future in it.”","html":"“Golf has been my passion since I was four. It’s part of who I am, and I still dream of a future in it.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He also cherishes life’s simplest joys. “One of my proudest moments after rehab was making my first plate of food for myself — spaghetti bolognese,” he smiles.","html":"He also cherishes life’s simplest joys. “One of my proudest moments after rehab was making my first plate of food for myself — spaghetti bolognese,” he smiles."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Niemand and Bredenhann are now close friends, often sharing a braai together. For Bredenhann, the reward is seeing Niemand thrive. “When we took him to rehab, he had nothing. That’s where support really matters.”","html":"Niemand and Bredenhann are now close friends, often sharing a braai together. For Bredenhann, the reward is seeing Niemand thrive. “When we took him to rehab, he had nothing. That’s where support really matters.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Niemand hopes his story will inspire others still trapped on the streets or in addiction.","html":"Niemand hopes his story will inspire others still trapped on the streets or in addiction."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"“Drugs kill you from the inside out. All you think about is your next fix. But you can break free — you just can’t do it alone.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton Network News","html":"Article: Caxton Network News"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
